responsibilities: Analyze business documents and extract structured information using machine learning techniques.
Develop computer vision or OCR-based prototypes for document understanding.
Support video analysis tasks such as object detection, tracking, or event recognition.
Collaborate with engineering and product teams to evaluate model performance.
Document project progress, limitations, and future improvement opportunities.
required_skills: Currently pursuing or recently completed a degree in Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Data Science, or a related field.
Experience with Python and machine learning libraries.
Familiarity with computer vision, image processing, or deep learning.
Ability to work with unstructured data and design preprocessing pipelines.
preferred_skills: Experience with OCR, document AI, or multimodal AI systems.
Experience with PyTorch, OpenCV, or similar tools.
Familiarity with LLM-based workflows or AI agents.
